title: Cutting Edge 3 Piece Paint Brush Set - Professional Premium Quality - Precision Angled Cutting In Paint Brushes - for Sharp Edge Lines Painting with Paints on Walls, Ceilings, Wood & Metal, 1"|1.5"|2"
features: 【ANGLED 3-PAINTBRUSH SET】 Cutting Edge Paint Brush pack of 3. This painting supply package is made from high quality ‘Solid Round Tapered’ (SRT) bristles. The brushes don't require breaking in. The paintbrush kit contains 1" Angled Slim Sash Brush, 1.5" Angled Slim Sash Brush, 2" Angled Compact Sash Brush (38.1mm, 25.4mm, 50.8mm).

【WITH OUR ANGULAR DETAIL PAINT BRUSH】 it's easier to paint clean lines. Use it for anything with grooves, like cabinets, furniture, panelled doors, edge and corner cutting-in, or when painting close to another surface, such as between window trim and walls. Perfect for completing tricky indoor areas that need more precise cutting-in, such as around door frames or above skirtings.

【PREMIUM QUALITY】 The paintbrush’s synthetic filaments are attached to the beavertail handle by a stainless steel ferrule. Durable & long-lasting, longer than natural bristle. The wooden handle is designed to fit the palm with utmost levels of comfort.

【CLEAN PAINT JOB】 These high-quality brushes allow you to apply an even layer of paint. The brushes offer great precision and smooth sharp lines. With premium, machine roughed Solid Round Tapered (SRT) filament, great for precise cutting in and other detail work. When used carefully, these paintbrushes don't require masking tapes to achieve sharp lines.

【SIMPLE TO USE】 These paint brushes are great tools for both new and professional painters. The paintbrush kit can be used for both interior and exterior painting jobs or even cleaning around the home. Don’t need ‘breaking in’, can be used immediately after opening the package. Suitable for any paint or varnish.

【EASY TO CLEAN】 after every use, just remove wet paints or stains from brushes, wash and rinse the brushes with water or solvent according to different paints or emulsions, then hang them on a hook or rack for drip-dry, and put them in storage very conveniently, get ready for next use.
description: The original Cutting Edge Premium professional Synthetic paintbrushes. The ergonomic beavertail handle allows steady handling, you won't need masking tape when you use Cutting Edge! Manufactured using the highest quality SRT (Solid Round Tapered) synthetic fibres. These paint brushes don't need 'breaking in', as they work perfectly straight out of the box, unlike traditional brushes. With a stainless-steel ferrule and an ergonomically-shaped handle for a comfortable fit in your hand. Ideal for straight line tracing and smooth paint finishes. Tried, tested and trusted by professional decorators around the UK, the Cutting Edge paint brush range gives you a great finish every time. Suitable for use with all paint and varnishes. GREAT DECORATING TOOL for both new and professional painters. Perfect for any DIY job. Long comfortable wooden handle for excellent control. Use ANGLED BRUSHES whenever details are small. They work well for cutting in along edges and getting straight lines. A thin angled brush is great for when you need a particularly crisp line, while a thicker angled brush holds more paint and works well along ceilings. If you're painting a large, flat surface, you'll need a FLAT BRUSH so you can get the job done quickly and easily. HIGH SPECIFICATION , fine-tipped synthetic filaments deliver a smooth, even finish with minimal brush marks (tramlines). Perfect for completing tricky indoor or outdoor areas that need more precise cutting-in, such as around door frames or above skirtings. A great brush solution for cutting in around the top of a wall near the ceiling, around light fixtures and for painting other hard-to-reach areas. Small ones are perfect for cutting in corners, edges and around architraves, skirting and window frames with water-based paints including emulsions (eg. matt, silk, eggshell), painting them with gloss or satin, as well as wood stains and varnishes. EASY TO CLEAN after every use, just remove wet paints or stains from brushes, wash and rinse the brushes with water or solvent according to different paints or emulsions, then hang them on a hook or rack for drip-dry, and put them in storage very conveniently, get ready for next use. Thus, our Wall Paint Brushes can be reused multiple times, giving you great value for money.
